name: carbon-pricing
title: Carbon Pricing & Emissions Trading Schemes
description: Global carbon pricing initiatives — carbon taxes and emissions trading schemes (ETS) — drawn from the World Bank Carbon Pricing Dashboard. Covers 128 compliance instruments across 70+ jurisdictions with annual price data (USD/tCO₂e) from 1990 to 2024. Includes a supplementary time series of New Zealand ETS monthly NZU spot prices from 2010 to present.

sources.name: World Bank Carbon Pricing Dashboard
sources.title: World Bank Carbon Pricing Dashboard — State and Trends of Carbon Pricing (April 2024)

sources.name: theecanmole/nzu
sources.title: New Zealand Emission Unit (NZU) Prices — theecanmole on GitHub (ODC PDDL)

resources.name: carbon-pricing-initiatives
resources.description: Overview of all compliance carbon pricing initiatives (CPIs) — carbon taxes and ETS — tracked by the World Bank. One row per instrument.

fields.name: id
fields.description: World Bank unique identifier for the instrument (e.g. Tax_FI, ETS_EU)

fields.name: name
fields.description: Full name of the carbon pricing instrument

fields.name: type
fields.description: Instrument type: Carbon tax or ETS (Emissions Trading Scheme)

fields.name: status
fields.description: Implementation status and start year (e.g. Implemented in 1990, Under consideration)

fields.name: jurisdiction
fields.description: Country, region, or subnational jurisdiction covered by the instrument

fields.name: share_jurisdiction_pct
fields.description: Share of the jurisdiction's total GHG emissions covered by this instrument (%)

fields.name: share_global_pct
fields.description: Share of global GHG emissions covered by this instrument (%)

fields.name: current_price_label
fields.description: Current carbon price as of April 2024 (local currency and USD equivalent)

resources.name: carbon-prices
resources.description: Annual carbon prices in USD per tonne of CO₂-equivalent for each initiative, 1990–2024. Long format: one row per initiative per year. Only years with a reported price are included.

fields.name: initiative
fields.description: Name of the carbon pricing instrument

fields.name: type
fields.description: Instrument type: Carbon tax or ETS

fields.name: income_group
fields.description: World Bank income classification of the jurisdiction

fields.name: price_usd_per_tco2e
fields.description: Carbon price in USD per tonne of CO₂-equivalent

resources.name: nz-ets-monthly-prices
resources.description: Monthly mean spot price of New Zealand Emission Units (NZUs) in the NZ Emissions Trading Scheme, from May 2010 to present. Prices are in New Zealand dollars (NZD) per NZU (1 NZU = 1 tonne CO₂-equivalent).

fields.name: date
fields.description: Date of the monthly price observation (mid-month)

fields.name: price_nzd
fields.description: Monthly mean NZU spot price in New Zealand dollars (NZD) per tonne CO₂-equivalent

views.name: nz-ets-prices
views.title: New Zealand ETS Monthly NZU Prices (2010–present)
